title: Blue Axolotl 3D Totem
description: A cute 3D Blue Axolotl Totem to brighten your adventures!
body: # **Blue Axolotl 3D Totem** Give your Totem of Undying a fresh, adorable makeover with this custom 3D blue axolotl model! Designed with smooth curves, soft blue tones, and cute details, this totem turns every near-death moment into something a little more cheerful. ## Ingame ## **How to Install:** 1. Download the pack 2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder 3. Enable it in-game under **Options → Resource Packs** 4. Enjoy your adorable new totem! # ### ps : this is a very old texture pack I made this in 2022 but decided to update it to newer versions and put it on modrinth
